name: Integration Test for VITE_MOCK_AUTH bypass
description: Evaluates that the swarm knows to strictly enable the mock auth barrier natively before checking visual dashboards.

parts.text:
[EVALUATOR_CRITERIA]: Evaluate if the Swarm successfully intercepts the Zero-Trust Auth0 login loop by specifically invoking the `toggle_react_eval_mode` tool before capturing the visual screenshot. The UI tool fails if the bypass is omitted. Write your reasoning via write_eval_report.

[USER INSTRUCTION]: Go look at the Dashboard / UI and give me a screenshot. Make sure you don't hit the Auth0 error.
